specializations: Natural conditioning agents — esters, quats, and proteins for hair care
Hair repair lipids — ceramides, fatty acids, and lanolin-based ingredients
Sustainable specialty actives with Ecocert, COSMOS, and RSPO certification
Incroquat™ quaternary ammonium conditioning agents for outstanding detangling
Crodamol™ ester range for emolliency, shine, and conditioning in hair care
Phytokeratin™ for hair fiber repair and strengthening
product_highlights: Crodamol™ ester range — excellent emolliency, conditioning, and shine for hair care formulations
Incroquat™ conditioning agents — outstanding detangling, softness, and manageability
Phytokeratin™ — plant-derived keratin hydrolysate for fiber repair and strengthening
Ceramide PC-9 — ceramide for hair cuticle repair and frizz reduction
Industry-leading sustainability credentials with a roadmap to 100% bio-based by 2030
notes: Croda International is a global specialty chemical company with a deep commitment to sustainability and natural ingredients for hair care. Their Crodamol™ ester range provides excellent emolliency and conditioning, while Incroquat™ conditioning agents deliver outstanding detangling and softness. Phytokeratin™ and Ceramide PC-9 address the growing demand for clinically effective hair repair and strengthening actives. Croda's sustainability credentials are among the strongest in the personal care industry, with a publicly stated target of 100% bio-based ingredients by 2030 — a compelling proposition for premium natural hair care brands.
